metadata.title: Search | Slashie
metadata.description: Search Slashie tasks and workers with map-first filters for local help.

en.title: Search tasks and workers
en.description: Find open tasks, local workers, and nearby opportunities on the map.
en.emptyDescription: Adjust your filters or move the map to search another area.

metadata.title: 搜尋 | Slashie
metadata.description: 使用地圖優先篩選搜尋 Slashie 任務和 workers。

zh_hk.title: 搜尋任務和 workers
zh_hk.description: 在地圖上尋找公開任務、本地 workers 和附近機會。
zh_hk.emptyDescription: 調整篩選或移動地圖，搜尋另一個地區。
